name: Double Chocolate Brownies
recipeIngredient: 2 oz White chocolate, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Butter an 8 or 9 inch square baking pan and line it with parchment paper or waxed paper.
3. Combine melted chocolate with melted butter.
4. With a whisk, beat eggs with sugar and vanilla extract.
5. Beat in the chocolate mixture.
6. Stir flour with baking powder and salt.
7. Stir the flour mixture into the chocolate mixture.
8. Stir in white chocolate and pecans.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 30 minutes.
10. (Brownies may appear to be underbaked but will set when chilled.)
11. Cool, pressing sides down as brownies cool.
12. Drizzle melted white and dark chocolate in a zigzag pattern on top of the uncut brownies.
13. Allow to rest at room temperature for 1/2 hour.
14. Cut into squares and chill.
